zh.lifeSummary: 當Jan II van Cysoing於1152年出生時，他的父親Jan Ier VAN PETEGHEM37歲，母親Pétronille16歲。他於大約1184年與Mabille De Guines - De Marck在法國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1220年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德希享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jan II van Cysoing于1152年出生时，他的父亲Jan Ier VAN PETEGHEM37岁，母亲Pétronille16岁。他于大约1184年与Mabille De Guines - De Marck在法国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1220年在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德希享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Jan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Ivan   or   Evan  , as in the case of the American film actor  Van Heflin  (  1910–71 , born  Emmett Evan Heflin ) and the Northern Irish singer  Van Morrison  (  b. 1945  as  George Ivan Morrison ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jan II van Cysoing was born in 1152, his father, Jan Ier VAN PETEGHEM, was 37 and his mother, Pétronille, was 16. He married Mabille De Guines - De Marck about 1184, in France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1220, in Cysoing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jan II van Cysoing est né en 1152, son père, Jan Ier VAN PETEGHEM, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Pétronille, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Mabille De Guines - De Marck environ 1184, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1220, à Cysoing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jan II van Cysoing 1152 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jan Ier VAN PETEGHEM 37 und seine Mutter Pétronille 16. Er hat um 1184 in Frankreich Mabille De Guines - De Marck geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1220 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Cysoing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jan II van Cysoing è nato il nel 1152, il suo padre, Jan Ier VAN PETEGHEM, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Pétronille, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Mabille De Guines - De Marck circa 1184, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1220, nel Cysoing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jan II van Cysoingが1152年に生まれた時，父Jan Ier VAN PETEGHEMは37歳，母Pétronilleは16歳であった。約1184年にフランスでMabille De Guines - De Marckと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1220年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードシソイングで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jan II van Cysoing(이)가 1152년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jan Ier VAN PETEGHEM(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Pétronille(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1184년 프랑스에서 Mabille De Guines - De Marck(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1220년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 시소잉에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jan II van Cysoing nasceu em 1152, seu pai, Jan Ier VAN PETEGHEM, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Pétronille, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Mabille De Guines - De Marck aproximadamente 1184, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1220, em Cysoing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jan II van Cysoing родился в 1152 г., его отцу по имени Jan Ier VAN PETEGHEM было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Pétronille, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabille De Guines - De Marck около 1184 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1220 г. в местности сисоинг, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 68 лет.

sm.van 1197 to 1220: mai le 1197 e o'o I le 1220

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jan II van Cysoing nació en 1152, su papá, Jan Ier VAN PETEGHEM, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Pétronille, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Mabille De Guines - De Marck aproximadamente 1184, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1220, en Cysoing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 68 años.
